metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5454
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 13, 14: After a series of low-resolution confocal imaging, authors used immunogold EM to confirm NCKX2 (SLC24A2) localization to the pre- and post-synapse. Localization to synaptic terminals was more prominent than localization to dendritic spines, authors note "Only a minority of gold particles were located on spines". Knockout mice were used as controls.. Experimental description: Results: "Our study describes for the first time the detailed subcellular location of NCKX2 in the mouse brain, and suggests a non-synaptic impact on neuronal plasticity by modulating dendritic excitability."

antibody:
"affinity purified polyclonal NCKX2 antibody "N2F" (diluted 1:400). This antibody was raised in rabbits immunized with a glutathione S-transferase fusion protein encoding amino acids 384-463 of rat NCKX2, and affinity purified using a parallel maltose-binding protein-fusion (Li et al., 2006)."
